message:
Running command: # Good - it's running and already past STA pre-PnR (step 29). 
# Wait 30s and check progress
sleep 30
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_resume2.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null
echo "---steps so far---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/ | sort -V | tail -10
echo "---log tail---"
tail -6 /tmp/pnr_resume2.log
